growth_records.strain: TK 0001 DSM 1337, Mea-C (empty vector pTE1887 control)
growth_records.medium: MO minimal medium, methanol sole carbon source

up.method: HPLC time-course, GP I exponential (reported qMeOH=-16.18)

yields.Yxs: GP I 10.06 gCDW/mol C; GP II 15.32 gCDW/mol C (Y_X/S)

growth_records.cite: Dietz et al. A novel engineered strain of Methylorubrum extorquens for methylotrophic production of glycolic acid. Microbial Cell Factories (2024). DOI:10.1186/s12934-024-02583-y. [PMC11665112]
growth_records.notes: Empty-vector control = essentially wild-type M. extorquens TK 0001 physiology on methanol. Table 4, no glyoxylate feed. Reported: GP I mu=0.16 h-1, qMeOH=-16.18 mmol/gDW/h, Y_X/S=10.06 gCDW/mol C; GP II mu=0.16, qMeOH=-10.29, Y_X/S=15.32; GP III mu=-0.02 (decline), qMeOH=0. No GA or LA produced (qGA=qLA=0). q values negative in table = uptake; magnitudes recorded. Doubling time td=ln2/0.16=4.33 h (GP I). Text also states wild-type methanol uptake measured in-lab at 15.0-15.7 mmol MeOH/gCDW/h. Methanol 1% v/v ~7.9 g/L. Full salt composition per ref [61], not restated (medium_composition_stated=false).

growth_records.strain: TK 0001 DSM 1337, Mea-C (empty vector), + glyoxylate feed
growth_records.medium: MO minimal medium, methanol + glyoxylate co-feed

up.method: GP I cumulated carbon uptake qC=-23.33

yields.Yxs: GP I 6.96, GP II 10.21, GP III 14.90 gCDW/mol C

growth_records.cite: Dietz et al. A novel engineered strain of Methylorubrum extorquens for methylotrophic production of glycolic acid. Microbial Cell Factories (2024). DOI:10.1186/s12934-024-02583-y. [PMC11665112]
growth_records.notes: Control strain with glyoxylate co-feed (Table 4). GP I mu=0.16, qMeOH=-16.88, qGox=-3.22, qC=-23.33 mmol C/gDW/h, Y_X/S=6.96; GP II mu=0.16, qMeOH=-10.45, qGox=-2.51, qC=-15.48, Y_X/S=10.21; GP III mu=0.03, qMeOH=-1.91, Y_X/S=14.90. No GA/LA (empty vector). qC computed by authors from carbon atoms of MeOH (1C) and glyoxylate (2C). Methods mention 1 g/L glyoxylate for one experiment; KPI tables/footnotes use 1.5 g/L. td(GP I)=ln2/0.16=4.33 h.

growth_records.medium: MO minimal medium, methanol sole carbon source

yields.Yxs: GP I 10.49, GP II 7.17 gCDW/mol C

growth_records.cite: Dietz et al. A novel engineered strain of Methylorubrum extorquens for methylotrophic production of glycolic acid. Microbial Cell Factories (2024). DOI:10.1186/s12934-024-02583-y. [PMC11665112]
growth_records.notes: First-generation GA producer (heterologous NADPH-dependent glyoxylate reductase ghrA from E. coli). Table 4 (no GX feed) + Table 3 titers. GP I: mu=0.17, qMeOH=-16.02, qGA=0.12, qLA=0.21, Y_X/S=10.49; GP II: mu=0.07, qMeOH=-10.17, qGA=0.34, qLA=0.21, Y_X/S=7.17, Y_GA/S=33.85 mmol/mol C, Y_LA/S=20.44; GP III: mu=0.03, qMeOH=-2.94, qGA=-0.08, qLA=-0.06 (re-consumption). Titers (Table 3): GA_max=0.24 g/L, LA=0.18 g/L, Q_GA=20.17 mg/L/h, Q_LA=15.03 mg/L/h. td(GP I)=ln2/0.17=4.08 h. LA is an unexpected by-product (surplus NADH).

growth_records.medium: MO minimal medium, methanol + 1.5 g/L glyoxylate co-feed

sec.method: GP II qGA (peak specific GA rate)

yields.Yxs: GP I 14.11, GP II 6.53 gCDW/mol C

growth_records.cite: Dietz et al. A novel engineered strain of Methylorubrum extorquens for methylotrophic production of glycolic acid. Microbial Cell Factories (2024). DOI:10.1186/s12934-024-02583-y. [PMC11665112]
growth_records.notes: Mea-GA1 with 1.5 g/L glyoxylate co-feed (Table 4) + Table 3 titers. GP I: mu=0.17, qMeOH=-7.27, qGox=-2.22, qC=-11.70, qGA=0.23, qLA=0.20, Y_X/S=14.11; GP II: mu=0.09, qMeOH=-10.31, qGox=-1.77, qC=-13.85, qGA=1.21, qLA=0.19, Y_X/S=6.53, Y_GA/S=87.68 mmol/mol C; GP III: mu=0.03, qMeOH=-4.42, qGox=-0.20, qGA=0.51, qLA=0.14. Glyoxylate feed raised GA titer 4x to 1.04 g/L (Q_GA=44.34 mg/L/h). Table 3 titers: GA_max=1.04, LA=0.32 g/L.

growth_records.medium: MO minimal medium, methanol sole carbon source

yields.Yxs: GP I 9.08, GP II 8.54 gCDW/mol C

growth_records.cite: Dietz et al. A novel engineered strain of Methylorubrum extorquens for methylotrophic production of glycolic acid. Microbial Cell Factories (2024). DOI:10.1186/s12934-024-02583-y. [PMC11665112]
growth_records.notes: Second-generation strain (ghrA_eco + ecm_mea). Table 5 (no GX feed) + Table 3. GP I: mu=0.13, qMeOH=-14.83, qGA=0.15, qLA=0.29, Y_X/S=9.08; GP II: mu=0.11, qMeOH=-12.44, qGA=0.31, qLA=0.21, Y_X/S=8.54; GP III: mu=0.04, qMeOH=-5.36, qGA=0.14, qLA=0.15. Titers (Table 3): GA_max=0.26 g/L, LA=0.30 g/L, Q_GA=11.36 mg/L/h. td(GP I)=ln2/0.13=5.33 h.

growth_records.medium: MO minimal medium, methanol + 1.5 g/L glyoxylate co-feed

yields.Yxs: GP I 5.97, GP II 6.91, GP III 4.64 gCDW/mol C

growth_records.cite: Dietz et al. A novel engineered strain of Methylorubrum extorquens for methylotrophic production of glycolic acid. Microbial Cell Factories (2024). DOI:10.1186/s12934-024-02583-y. [PMC11665112]
growth_records.notes: Mea-GA2 + 1.5 g/L glyoxylate (Table 5) + Table 3. GP I: mu=0.14, qMeOH=-16.82, qGox=-3.08, qC=-22.99, qGA=0.29, qLA=0.25, Y_X/S=5.97; GP II: mu=0.06, qMeOH=-4.54, qGox=-2.16, qC=-8.86, qGA=0.31, qLA=0.09; GP III: mu=0.03, qMeOH=-6.14, qGox=-0.46, qGA=0.39, qLA=0.16, Y_GA/S=55.26. Titers: GA_max=0.53 g/L, LA=0.26 g/L, Q_GA=21.34 mg/L/h. td(GP I)=ln2/0.14=4.95 h.

growth_records.medium: MO minimal medium, methanol sole carbon source

yields.Yxs: GP I 9.96, GP II 6.48 gCDW/mol C

growth_records.cite: Dietz et al. A novel engineered strain of Methylorubrum extorquens for methylotrophic production of glycolic acid. Microbial Cell Factories (2024). DOI:10.1186/s12934-024-02583-y. [PMC11665112]
growth_records.notes: Second-generation strain (ghrA_eco + ecm_rsh from R. sphaeroides). Table 5 (no GX feed) + Table 3. GP I: mu=0.16, qMeOH=-16.38, qGA=0.13, qLA=0.23, Y_X/S=9.96; GP II: mu=0.07, qMeOH=-10.42, qGA=0.25, qLA=0.25, Y_X/S=6.48; GP III: mu=0.04, qMeOH=-3.88, qGA=-0.04 (re-uptake), qLA=0.11. Titers: GA_max=0.15 g/L, LA=0.18 g/L, Q_GA=13.04 mg/L/h. td(GP I)=ln2/0.16=4.33 h.

growth_records.medium: MO minimal medium, methanol + 1.5 g/L glyoxylate co-feed

yields.Yxs: GP I 12.39, GP II 5.50 gCDW/mol C

growth_records.cite: Dietz et al. A novel engineered strain of Methylorubrum extorquens for methylotrophic production of glycolic acid. Microbial Cell Factories (2024). DOI:10.1186/s12934-024-02583-y. [PMC11665112]
growth_records.notes: Mea-GA3 + 1.5 g/L glyoxylate (Table 5) + Table 3. GP I: mu=0.16, qMeOH=-9.68, qGox=-1.54, qC=-12.76, qGA=0.29, qLA=0.23, Y_X/S=12.39; GP II: mu=0.08, qMeOH=-11.09, qGox=-1.95, qC=-14.99, qGA=0.84, qLA=0.22, Y_X/S=5.50, Y_GA/S=55.73; GP III: mu=0.03, qMeOH=-6.33, qGox=-0.30, qGA=0.26, qLA=0.24. Titers: GA_max=0.64 g/L, LA=0.46 g/L, Q_GA=23.13 mg/L/h. td(GP I)=ln2/0.16=4.33 h.

growth_records.medium: MO minimal medium, methanol (repeated 5 g/L pulse feeding)

up.method: GP I batch/growth phase (qMeOH=12.70+/-0.56, reported in C-mmol)

sec.method: GP II qGA=0.93+/-0.02 (no GA in GP I)

yields.Yxs: GP I 11.85+/-0.64, GP II 4.81+/-0.32 gCDW/mol C (Y_X/MeOH)

growth_records.cite: Dietz et al. A novel engineered strain of Methylorubrum extorquens for methylotrophic production of glycolic acid. Microbial Cell Factories (2024). DOI:10.1186/s12934-024-02583-y. [PMC11665112]
growth_records.notes: Fed-batch fermentation of best-performing Mea-GA1 (Table 6). GP I (batch/growth): mu=0.15+/-0.00, qMeOH=12.70+/-0.56 C-mmol/gDW/h, no product, Y_X/MeOH=11.85+/-0.64 gCDW/mol C. GP II (production): mu=0.08+/-0.00, qMeOH=16.54+/-0.94, qGA=0.93+/-0.02, qLA=0.95+/-0.03 C-mmol/gDW/h, Y_X/MeOH=4.81+/-0.32, Y_GA/MeOH=56.38+/-1.51, Y_LA/MeOH=57.55+/-0.96 C-mmol/mol C. Total GA+LA titer up to 1.2 g/L. NOTE rates here reported in C-mmol (carbon-mmol) not mmol substrate, per Table 6 header. td(GP I)=ln2/0.15=4.62 h. q values reported as positive magnitudes (uptake) in this table.

phenotypes.base_medium: Acid/gas-production test: peptone/complex base + substrate + pH indicator — positive = fermentative acid production, NOT growth on the substrate as a sole carbon source (interpret with care for model validation)
phenotypes.citation: BacDive strain 7146 (Reimer LC et al., BacDive 2022, NAR); https://bacdive.dsmz.de/strain/7146

phenotypes.base_medium: Sole-substrate growth / assimilation on a defined minimal medium (substrate as C/N/energy source) — positive = the organism grows on it
phenotypes.citation: BacDive strain 7146 (Reimer LC et al., BacDive 2022, NAR); https://bacdive.dsmz.de/strain/7146

phenotypes.base_medium: Enzyme / activity assay (hydrolysis, degradation, reduction, electron transfer) in a test medium — not a sole-substrate growth test

phenotype_groups.label: Complex/peptone base (acid-production test)
